name: range-slider
description: Two-thumb slider for selecting a numeric range with step and gap constraints.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Current low (start) value of the range.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Current high (end) value of the range.

props.name: onRangeChange
props.description: Callback invoked when either thumb moves; receives the updated [min, max] values.

props.name: min
props.description: Absolute minimum the low thumb can reach.

props.name: max
props.description: Absolute maximum the high thumb can reach.

props.name: minGap
props.description: Minimum gap enforced between the two thumbs.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the slider is non-interactive and visually dimmed.

props.name: showValues
props.description: When true, displays the current numeric values above the thumbs.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label rendered above the slider.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container.
